name: Arokya Toned Milk
description:
Arokya Toned Milk is a popular dairy product produced by Hatsun Agro Product Ltd, a well-established dairy company based in Tamil Nadu. Toned milk is created by blending whole milk with skim milk and water to reduce the fat content, typically to around 3% or lower, while keeping most of the natural nutrients intact. This makes it a lighter and healthier option compared with full-cream variants, especially for daily consumption by families, students, and working adults.

Toned milk is rich in proteins, calcium, vitamins and minerals, supporting bone health, muscle function and general nutrition. Its lighter texture and balanced creaminess make it suitable for tea, coffee, cereals, smoothies, cooking, and baking without making the end product overly rich.

name: Aavin Diet Milk
description:
Aavin Diet Milk is a double-toned milk variant offered by the Tamil Nadu Co-operative Milk Producers’ Federation Ltd. Unlike full-cream or toned milk, double-toned milk undergoes extra fat-reduction during processing so that the total fat content is significantly lower, typically around 1.5 g per 100 ml. This makes it a good choice for people who want to enjoy milk while keeping calories and fat intake lower.

Like other Aavin products, this milk is pasteurised and homogenised to ensure safety and hygiene, and it is fortified with essential nutrients such as proteins, calcium and vitamins that support bone health and overall nutrition.

name: Milky Mist Table Salted Butter
description:
Milky Mist Table Salted Butter (100 g) is a creamy and flavorful dairy product made by Milky Mist Dairy Foods Pvt Ltd, a trusted dairy brand based in Tamil Nadu. It is prepared from fresh cream and blended with the right amount of salt to give a smooth texture and balanced salty taste. This butter spreads easily on bread, toast, buns, and sandwiches, making it a popular choice for breakfast and snacks.

With a milk fat content of around 80%, it delivers rich flavour and a soft mouthfeel. Besides being used as a spread, it can also enhance the taste of parathas, dosas, pav bhaji, and other Indian dishes. The added salt improves flavour and acts as a mild preservative.

Milky Mist Table Salted Butter contains essential fats and vitamin A, providing energy when consumed in moderation. Hygienically packed and sealed, it stays fresh when refrigerated and is convenient for everyday use.

name: Milky Mist Pro Biotin Curd
description:
Milky Mist Pro Biotin Curd is a functional dairy product made by Milky Mist Dairy Foods Pvt Ltd, a well-known dairy brand from Tamil Nadu. This curd is enriched with probiotics and biotin, making it different from regular curd. Probiotics are beneficial bacteria that help support digestive health and maintain a healthy gut balance. Biotin, a B-vitamin, contributes to healthy hair, skin, and overall metabolism.

Prepared from high-quality pasteurised milk, this curd has a thick, creamy texture and mild tangy taste. It can be consumed plain, mixed with rice, or used in smoothies, raitas, and salads. Regular consumption as part of a balanced diet may help improve digestion and nutrient absorption.

Hygienically packed to preserve freshness, Milky Mist Pro Biotin Curd should be refrigerated after purchase. With its added nutritional benefits, it offers a convenient way to include both probiotics and essential vitamins in everyday meals.

name: Aavin Delite Milk
description:
Aavin Delite Milk 500 ml is a long-life milk variant from the Tamil Nadu Co-operative Milk Producers’ Federation (Aavin). It is processed using UHT (Ultra High Temperature) technology, which heats the milk at very high temperature in a sterile environment so that it stays fresh for an extended period — up to 90 days without refrigeration — without adding preservatives.

This milk has about 3.5 % fat and 8.5 % SNF (Solids Not Fat), giving it a balanced texture that’s lighter than full-cream milk yet richer than toned milk. Aavin Delite is fortified with essential nutrients like proteins, calcium, and added vitamins, making it suitable for daily consumption by families, students, and working adults alike.

name: Milky Mist Paneer
description:
Milky Mist Paneer is a fresh Indian cottage cheese produced by Milky Mist Dairy Foods Pvt Ltd, a well-known dairy brand based in Tamil Nadu. It is made from high-quality milk using modern processing methods to ensure hygiene, freshness, and consistent texture. The paneer is soft, moist, and creamy, with a mild milky flavour that makes it suitable for a wide variety of Indian dishes.

Rich in protein and calcium, Milky Mist Paneer supports muscle health and strong bones, making it a nutritious addition to daily meals. It is commonly used in popular dishes such as paneer butter masala, palak paneer, paneer tikka, and stuffed parathas. Because of its firm yet tender texture, it holds its shape well during cooking without becoming rubbery.

name: Arokya Full Cream Milk
description:
Arokya Full Cream Milk is a popular dairy product from one of South India’s well-known milk brands. It is packaged fresh in hygienic pouches or cans and widely available in 500 ml, 1 L, and larger sizes at retail stores and online platforms across India. This milk contains a rich full-cream formulation, typically with around 6 % fat, giving it a creamy texture and wholesome flavour that’s ideal for drinking plain or adding to beverages like tea, coffee and milkshakes.

It’s a nutritious choice for everyday consumption, supplying essential nutrients such as protein, calcium, and vitamins that support bone health and overall growth. Arokya’s processing ensures the milk is pasteurized and safe, meeting food safety standards. The brand’s full cream variant is especially favored in households that prefer a richer milk experience compared with toned or standardised milks.

This milk can also be used in cooking and baking, making it versatile for both sweet and savoury recipes.

name: Milky Mist Blueberry Flavoured Yogurt
description: Milky Mist Blueberry-Flavoured Yogurt (100 g) is a popular fruit-yogurt product made by Milky Mist Dairy Foods, a well-known Indian dairy manufacturer based in Tamil Nadu. It combines creamy yogurt with real blueberry fruit flavour, giving it a sweet-tart fruity taste and smooth texture that many people enjoy as a snack or light dessert. The product typically contains live cultures and probiotics, which help support gut health and digestion when included as part of a balanced diet. Milky Mist’s blueberry yogurt also provides essential nutrients like calcium and protein, making it both tasty and nutritionally beneficial for everyday consumption. You can eat it straight from the cup, add it to breakfast bowls with fruits and cereals, or use it as a topping on smoothies and desserts.

name: Orange
description:
Brighten your day with our Premium Zesty Navel Orange, a burst of liquid sunshine in every bite. Carefully harvested from the world’s finest citrus groves, these oranges are selected for their heavy weight and thin, vibrant skins—true indicators of the high juice content held within. Peel back the fragrant rind to reveal tender, seedless segments that offer a perfect equilibrium of refreshing sweetness and a classic citrus tang.

Rich in Vitamin C, antioxidants, and dietary fiber, our oranges are the gold standard for immune support and natural vitality. Whether you’re squeezing a glass of vibrant, morning juice, tossing fresh slices into a summer salad, or simply enjoying it as a mess-free, portable snack, the quality remains unmatched. We ensure each fruit is handled with care to preserve its natural oils and firm texture, delivering orchard-to-table freshness. Pure, sun-ripened, and intensely flavorful—this is citrus exactly as nature intended.

name: Milky Mist Sweetened Condensed
description:
Milky Mist Sweetened Condensed Milk (400 g) is a rich and creamy dairy product made by Milky Mist Dairy Foods Pvt Ltd, a well-known dairy brand from Tamil Nadu. It is prepared by removing most of the water content from milk and adding sugar, resulting in a thick, smooth, and sweet product with a concentrated milky flavour.

This condensed milk is widely used in Indian and international desserts such as kheer, payasam, gulab jamun, cakes, puddings, and ice creams. It blends easily into recipes, enhancing sweetness and giving a creamy texture without the need for additional sugar or milk.

Rich in energy, carbohydrates, and dairy nutrients like calcium, it should be consumed in moderation due to its high sugar content. Packed hygienically in sealed tins or pouches, Milky Mist Sweetened Condensed Milk is convenient for home baking and festive cooking, making desserts richer and more flavourful.

name: Milky Mist Cooking Unsalted Butter
description:
Milky Mist Cooking Unsalted Butter (200 g) is a premium dairy product manufactured by Milky Mist Dairy Foods Pvt Ltd, a well-known brand based in Tamil Nadu. Made from fresh cream, this butter has a smooth texture and rich, creamy flavour without added salt, making it ideal for cooking and baking. Because it is unsalted, it allows better control over seasoning in recipes.

With a high milk fat content of about 80%, it enhances the taste and texture of dishes such as sauces, gravies, sautéed vegetables, and continental preparations. It is also widely used in baking cakes, cookies, and pastries, where unsalted butter is preferred for precise flavour balance.

Milky Mist Cooking Unsalted Butter contains essential fats and fat-soluble vitamins like vitamin A, providing energy when consumed in moderation. Hygienically packed and sealed, it stays fresh when refrigerated and is a convenient choice for both home cooks and professional kitchens.

name: Apple
description:
Gemini said
Experience the ultimate crunch with our Premium Orchard-Fresh Red Apple. Hand-selected at the peak of ripeness, this apple is the perfect harmony of nature’s sweetness and a refreshing, tangy finish. Its vibrant, ruby-red skin protects a snow-white interior that is incredibly juicy and firm, ensuring a satisfying snap with every single bite.

Grown in mineral-rich soil and sun-drenched orchards, our apples are more than just a snack—they are a nutritional powerhouse. Naturally high in fiber and Vitamin C, they provide a clean energy boost that keeps you going throughout the day. Whether you are packing a healthy lunch, slicing them for a gourmet cheese board, or baking them into a warm, spiced crumble, their versatile flavor profile shines in every application.

name: Milky Mist Farm Fresh Curd
description: Milky Mist Farm Fresh Plain Curd is a creamy and wholesome dairy curd made by Milky Mist Dairy Foods Pvt Ltd, a well-known dairy brand based in Tamil Nadu. It is prepared from high-quality pasteurised milk using traditional fermentation cultures, which gives it a naturally thick texture, mild tangy flavour, and smooth consistency. Curd is a staple in Indian households, often eaten plain, with rice, or used in raitas, dips, and smoothies. Rich in calcium, protein, and probiotics, Milky Mist Farm Fresh Curd supports healthy digestion and contributes to daily nutritional needs. Curd’s beneficial bacterial cultures help maintain gut health and boost immunity when consumed regularly. Its fresh and slightly tangy taste makes it suitable for breakfast bowls with fruits, breakfast cereals, or as a cooling side with spicy meals. Hygienically packed in sealed tubs, this curd stays fresh when refrigerated and is convenient for everyday use. With an MRP of around ₹95 – ₹120 for 1 kg, it offers a nutritious and affordable dairy option for families.

name: Milky Mist Toned Milk
description:
Milky Mist Toned Milk is a quality dairy product from Milky Mist Dairy Foods Pvt Ltd, a well-known brand based in Tamil Nadu. Toned milk is prepared by adjusting the fat content of whole milk, usually to about 3% fat, making it lighter than full-cream milk while still retaining essential nutrients. It offers a smooth texture and balanced taste suitable for daily consumption.

This milk is rich in protein, calcium, and important vitamins, which help support bone strength, muscle health, and overall nutrition. Because of its moderate fat level, it is a preferred choice for families who want a healthier option without compromising on taste.

name: Milky Mist Cheddar Cheese Block
description:
Milky Mist Cheddar Cheese Block (200 g) is a flavorful dairy product made by Milky Mist Dairy Foods Pvt Ltd, a leading dairy brand based in Tamil Nadu. This cheese is prepared from high-quality milk and aged to develop a firm texture and rich, slightly sharp cheddar flavour. The block form makes it convenient for slicing, grating, or cubing according to cooking needs.

Cheddar cheese is a good source of protein, calcium, and essential fats, which help support bone health and overall nutrition. It melts smoothly, making it ideal for sandwiches, burgers, pasta, pizzas, baked dishes, and snacks. It can also be used in salads or enjoyed as cubes in cheese platters.

Packed hygienically in sealed packaging to maintain freshness, Milky Mist Cheddar Cheese Block should be refrigerated after opening. With its balanced taste and versatility, it is a convenient option for everyday cooking and snacking.

name: Amul Salted Butter
description:
Amul - Salted Butter, 100 gm is a classic Indian dairy product made from fresh cream with added common salt, giving it a smooth, creamy texture and a mildly salted flavour that’s familiar on breakfast tables across India. Amul Butter is manufactured by the Gujarat Cooperative Milk Marketing Federation (GCMMF), one of the country’s largest dairy cooperatives, known for consistent quality and taste.

With a high milk fat content (about 80%), this salted butter delivers rich dairy flavours and a luxurious mouthfeel, making it ideal for spreading on bread, toast, parathas, and sandwiches. Its versatility extends to cooking — adding depth to gravies, tadkas, and sautéed vegetables — and to baking, where it enhances the texture and flavour of cookies, cakes, and pastries.

Beyond everyday use, Amul Salted Butter also enriches sauces, sauces and continental dishes, thanks to its balanced salt and fat composition. It provides essential vitamins like vitamin A and energy from fats, though it should be used in moderation because of its high calorie and fat content.

Refrigerate after purchase to preserve freshness, and once opened consume within a week for best quality and taste.

name: Aavin Premium Milk
description: Aavin Premium Milk is a full-cream, pasteurised and homogenised milk product from the Tamil Nadu Co-operative Milk Producers’ Federation Ltd (Aavin). It is richer in fat and flavour compared with toned or standardised milk, giving a creamy texture and wholesome taste suitable for daily drinking, tea, coffee, cereals and cooking. Packaged hygienically in sealed pouches, Aavin Premium Milk retains essential nutrients like protein, calcium and minerals needed for healthy growth and bone strength.

name: Aavin Gold Fresh Milk
description:
Aavin Gold Milk is a premium dairy offering from the Tamil Nadu Cooperative Milk Producers' Federation, tailored for those who prefer a richer, creamier texture in their daily beverages. Distinguished by its signature yellow or orange-tinged packaging, it bridges the gap between standard milk and full-cream varieties.

With a fat content of approximately 5.0% and 8.5% Solids-Not-Fat (SNF), Aavin Gold is specifically pasteurized and homogenized to ensure a smooth consistency and safety. This higher fat percentage makes it a favorite for preparing thick, frothy coffees, rich puddings, and homemade desserts that require a velvety mouthfeel.

name: Milky Mist Cream Cheese
description: Milky Mist Cream Cheese 200 g is a popular Indian cream cheese spread made from high-quality cow’s milk and cream, known for its smooth, soft, and creamy texture with a mild tangy profile that appeals to a wide range of tastes. This product is completely natural and fresh, with no added preservatives, offering a wholesome dairy experience. It’s versatile in the kitchen—excellent as a bread spread for breakfast or snacks, and a great ingredient in sandwiches, pasta, dips, and wraps. The rich creaminess also makes it ideal for desserts and baking, especially cheesecakes where smooth, spreadable texture is key. Chefs and home cooks alike use it to add richness and depth to both sweet and savory dishes. Its balanced flavor and easy blendability make it a staple in many Indian kitchens.

name: Milky Mist Fruit Yogurt Strawberry
description:
Milky Mist Fruit Yogurt Strawberry 100 g and its larger variants are popular fruit-flavoured yogurts from Milky Mist Dairy Foods that combine creamy, fermented milk with a sweet strawberry taste and real fruit pieces for extra flavor. Made by culturing fresh milk with active lactic cultures, this strawberry yogurt delivers a smooth, luscious texture and mild tanginess that’s both refreshing and satisfying. It naturally contains calcium and protein, supporting healthy bones and muscles, and the live cultures help aid digestion by promoting beneficial gut bacteria.

This yogurt is versatile — enjoy it straight from the cup as a quick breakfast or snack, mix it with cereals or granola, or use it as a base for fruit smoothies and parfaits. The strawberry flavor adds a fruity sweetness without being overly sugary, making it a favourite for both kids and adults looking for a tasty yet wholesome dairy treat.

name: Milky Mist Cream
description:
Milky Mist Cream is a rich and smooth dairy product made from high-quality milk, designed to enhance the taste and texture of a wide variety of dishes. With around 20% milk fat, this low-fat dairy cream offers the perfect balance between richness and lightness, making it suitable for everyday cooking and dessert preparation. The cream is sterilized using advanced processing technology to maintain freshness, hygiene, and consistent quality while preserving its natural flavour.

It blends easily into both sweet and savoury recipes, making it ideal for preparing pasta, soups, gravies, desserts, fruit salads, and bakery items. The smooth and pourable texture allows effortless mixing without forming lumps, helping home cooks and professional chefs achieve restaurant-style results. Packed in a convenient, hygienic tetra pack, the cream remains fresh for longer when stored properly. Its mild flavour enhances dishes without overpowering other ingredients, making it a versatile addition to modern kitchens. Milky Mist Cream is widely trusted for its purity, consistent taste, and reliable quality standards.

name: Milky Mist Diet Curd
description:
Milky Mist Diet Curd is a light and nutritious dairy product specially prepared for health-conscious consumers who want to enjoy curd while maintaining a balanced diet. Made from carefully selected low-fat milk, this curd provides a smooth, creamy texture with a refreshing natural taste while containing reduced fat content. It is prepared using advanced fermentation methods with active cultures that help improve digestion and support gut health.

This diet curd is rich in calcium and protein, helping maintain strong bones, muscle strength, and overall wellness. It can be consumed directly as a healthy side dish with meals or used to prepare dishes like raita, buttermilk, smoothies, and salad dressings. The curd has a mild flavour that complements both traditional Indian recipes and modern healthy meals. Packed in a hygienic sealed container, it ensures freshness, purity, and convenience. Milky Mist Diet Curd is ideal for daily consumption and suits people who prefer tasty dairy products with lower fat content without compromising nutritional benefits.

name: Aavin Paneer
description:
Aavin Paneer is a fresh and soft cottage cheese made from high-quality milk, known for its rich taste, smooth texture, and excellent nutritional value. Prepared under hygienic processing conditions, this paneer maintains freshness and purity, making it a trusted dairy product in many households. It is naturally rich in protein and calcium, which helps support muscle strength, bone health, and overall body nourishment.

Aavin Paneer has a firm yet soft texture that holds its shape well during cooking while absorbing flavours effectively. It is widely used in Indian cuisine for preparing popular dishes such as paneer butter masala, palak paneer, paneer tikka, and various curries and gravies. It can also be added to salads, wraps, sandwiches, and snacks for a protein-rich meal. Packed in a sealed, food-grade pouch, the paneer remains fresh and convenient to use. Its mild and creamy flavour makes it suitable for both traditional and modern recipes, offering versatility in everyday cooking.

name: Hatsun Mango Lassi
description:
Hatsun Mango Lassi is a refreshing and delicious dairy beverage made by blending fresh curd with sweet and juicy mango flavour. It offers a smooth, creamy texture with a perfectly balanced sweetness and mild tanginess, making it a popular traditional Indian drink enjoyed by people of all age groups. Prepared using high-quality milk and carefully selected ingredients, this mango lassi delivers a rich taste while maintaining hygiene and freshness through advanced processing and packaging techniques.

This ready-to-drink beverage is a great source of calcium and protein, which help support bone strength and overall health. It is ideal for quick refreshment during hot weather, as a tasty snack between meals, or as a cooling drink after spicy foods. The convenient cup packaging makes it easy to carry and consume anytime, anywhere. Hatsun Mango Lassi combines the natural goodness of curd with the tropical sweetness of mango, offering a nutritious and flavourful beverage suitable for daily enjoyment.

name: Hatsun Pasteurised Cooking Butter
description:
Hatsun Pasteurised Cooking Butter is a rich and flavourful dairy product made from high-quality cow’s milk, specially designed to enhance the taste and aroma of everyday cooking. This butter is carefully pasteurised to maintain hygiene, freshness, and consistent quality while preserving its natural creamy texture and authentic buttery flavour. It melts smoothly and blends easily into dishes, making it suitable for both Indian and international recipes.

The butter adds a delicious richness to foods such as rotis, parathas, curries, rice dishes, baked items, and snacks. It is widely used in cooking, frying, and baking to improve taste and provide a smooth, creamy finish. Packed in a hygienic, sealed carton, the butter remains fresh and safe for consumption when stored under recommended refrigeration conditions. Hatsun Cooking Butter contains essential fats that provide energy and improve food flavour naturally. Its balanced salt content and smooth consistency make it convenient for daily kitchen use, helping home cooks prepare tasty and satisfying meals with ease and quality assurance.

name: Hatsun Curd
description:
Hatsun Curd is a fresh and creamy dairy product made from high-quality toned milk, offering a naturally rich taste and smooth consistency. Prepared using controlled fermentation with active lactic cultures, this curd delivers a refreshing flavour and supports digestive health. It is a staple food in many Indian households due to its nutritional benefits and versatility in daily meals.

This curd is a good source of calcium and protein, which help maintain strong bones, muscle strength, and overall wellness. Its thick texture and balanced taste make it ideal for direct consumption as a side dish with rice, chapati, or traditional meals. It can also be used to prepare recipes like raita, buttermilk, curd rice, smoothies, marinades, and salad dressings. Packed in a hygienic, sealed container, Hatsun Curd ensures freshness and safety when stored under refrigeration. Its consistent quality and natural flavour make it suitable for both cooking and regular consumption, providing a wholesome and refreshing dairy experience for families.

name: Hatsun Cow Milk
description:
Hatsun Cow Milk is a fresh and hygienically processed dairy product known for its natural taste, purity, and nutritional benefits. Sourced from healthy cows and processed using modern pasteurisation techniques, this milk ensures safety, freshness, and consistent quality. It contains essential nutrients such as calcium, protein, vitamins, and minerals that support bone strength, muscle development, and overall body growth.

This milk has a smooth texture and mild natural flavour, making it suitable for direct consumption as well as for preparing tea, coffee, milkshakes, sweets, and various cooking recipes. The balanced fat content makes it ideal for daily household use while maintaining nutritional value. Packed in a sealed, food-grade pouch, Hatsun Cow Milk maintains freshness and hygiene when stored under proper refrigeration. It is easy to handle and convenient for everyday use. Hatsun Cow Milk is widely trusted by families for its quality standards, purity, and consistent taste, making it a healthy and reliable dairy choice for all age groups.

name: Hatsun Cooking Butter
description:
Hatsun Cooking Butter is a high-quality pasteurised butter specially crafted to enhance the flavour and aroma of everyday cooking. Made from fresh and carefully processed cream, this butter delivers a rich, creamy texture that melts smoothly, making it perfect for preparing a variety of dishes. Its balanced salted taste adds depth to curries, gravies, sautéed vegetables, and baked recipes, ensuring consistent flavour in every meal.

The butter is hygienically processed and packed to maintain freshness, purity, and long-lasting quality. It spreads easily and blends well with both hot and cold food preparations. Ideal for home kitchens as well as professional cooking, Hatsun Cooking Butter helps create delicious dishes with a traditional dairy taste. It is also suitable for frying, roasting, and baking, offering versatility in cooking methods. Packed in a convenient and secure carton, it is easy to store under refrigeration. Hatsun Cooking Butter is trusted by households for its reliable quality, smooth texture, and authentic buttery flavour.

name: Hatsun Fruit Yoghurt Mixed Berry
description:
Hatsun Fruit Yoghurt Mixed Berry is a delicious and creamy dairy dessert that combines smooth yoghurt with the refreshing taste of mixed berries. Made using high-quality milk and carefully selected fruit flavours, this yoghurt offers a perfect balance of sweetness and mild tanginess. The rich and velvety texture makes it an enjoyable snack for all age groups and a refreshing treat during any time of the day.

Packed with essential nutrients from milk, it provides a wholesome option compared to regular desserts. The mixed berry flavour adds a fruity twist that enhances the overall taste experience. It can be enjoyed directly, used as a topping for cereals, blended into smoothies, or served as a dessert after meals. Hygienically processed and packed, it maintains freshness and consistent quality.

The convenient tub packaging ensures easy storage and usage for families. Hatsun Fruit Yoghurt Mixed Berry is ideal for those who enjoy fruity flavours combined with the goodness of dairy in a smooth and satisfying form.

name: Amul Half & Half Fresh Cream
description:
Amul Half & Half Fresh Cream is a versatile dairy cream product from Amul, designed to provide a balanced taste and texture that’s lighter than full-cream but richer than regular milk. It’s made from a blend of fresh milk and cream and has a smooth, creamy consistency that enhances beverages like coffee and tea without being overly heavy. This 15 % fat UHT-treated cream comes in convenient aseptic packaging, meaning it’s shelf-stable until opened.

Because it contains no vegetable oil or added preservatives, you get a natural dairy flavor that complements both sweet and savory recipes. It’s ideal for mixing into sauces, soups, pasta dishes, desserts, smoothies, and baked goods, adding richness without overwhelming other flavors. The product is easy to use straight from the pack or incorporated into cooking, making it a flexible choice for everyday kitchens.

name: Amul Mithai Mate Condensed Milk
description:
Amul Mithai Mate is a rich, sweetened condensed milk from India’s well-known dairy cooperative, Amul. It’s made by evaporating most of the water from milk and then adding sugar, resulting in a thick, creamy, and intensely sweet product that’s ideal for desserts and baking. The product has a smooth texture and sweet milky flavour that pairs perfectly with Indian sweets like gajar ka halwa, kheer, rasmalai, laddoos, and mithai, as well as western treats such as puddings, cakes, caramel sauces and toppings.

Because it’s ready to use straight from the tin, it saves time in the kitchen—no need to boil or add extra sugar for sweetness. It also contains milk solids and milk fat that contribute protein and calcium, making it a versatile ingredient for enriching recipes and adding indulgent sweetness.

name: Amul Probiotic High Protein Cup Curd
description:
Amul Probiotic High Protein Cup Curd is a nutritious dairy curd designed for health-conscious consumers who want both protein and gut-friendly benefits in one pack. This product combines the traditional Indian curd experience with enhanced nutritional value: it’s formulated to offer a higher protein content than regular curd, making it suitable for athletes, fitness enthusiasts, and anyone looking to boost daily protein intake. The curd also contains live probiotic cultures, which help support digestive health and a balanced gut microbiome—beneficial for overall well-being.

Made from pasteurised milk and active cultures, the texture is smooth and creamy, and because it has no added sugar, it retains a natural dairy flavour. Each 100 g typically provides around 6.3 g of protein and about 68 kcal, making it a wholesome option for breakfast, snacks, or post-workout refuelling. The product is also low in fat and free from trans fats.

name: Amul Fresh Malai Paneer
description:
Amul Fresh Malai Paneer is a premium-quality cottage cheese made from pure milk, offering a rich, creamy taste and soft texture. It is produced using hygienic processing and high-quality milk solids to ensure freshness, safety, and consistent flavour. This paneer has a smooth, uniform texture and mild milky taste, making it ideal for a wide range of Indian and international dishes.

It is an excellent source of protein and calcium, which help support muscle strength and bone health. The paneer is ready to cook and can be used in recipes like paneer butter masala, palak paneer, paneer tikka, curries, salads, and snacks. Its firm yet soft consistency allows it to absorb spices and flavours well, enhancing the overall taste of dishes.

Packed in a sealed hygienic pouch, Amul Fresh Malai Paneer ensures longer freshness when refrigerated. It is suitable for daily cooking and provides a convenient, nutritious option for vegetarians and paneer lovers.

name: Amul Masti Set Cup Curd Tub
description:
Amul Masti Set Curd Tub is a classic Indian curd (dahi) from Amul, made by fermenting fresh, pasteurised toned milk with traditional active cultures. It’s a staple dairy product in many Indian households, valued for its creamy texture, mild tanginess, and wholesome nutrition. Rich in high-quality protein and calcium, this curd supports digestive health and contributes to bone strength, making it both a tasty and nutritious choice for daily consumption.

The “Masti Set” name refers to the well-set curd that’s firm yet smooth — perfect for eating straight from the tub or using in a variety of Indian dishes. You can enjoy it with rice, rotis, parathas, or snacks, or use it to prepare popular recipes like raita, kadhi, dahi vada, and smoothies. Because it contains no added preservatives, the product retains a natural flavour and fresh dairy aroma.

Amul’s long-standing reputation for quality and consistency means this curd is a reliable everyday dairy product. The larger tub size also makes it economical for families or frequent curd eaters, ensuring you have plenty of creamy curd ready for multiple meals.

name: Amul Protein Lassi – Rose Flavour
description:
Amul Protein Lassi – Rose Flavour is a refreshing dairy beverage that combines the traditional goodness of lassi with the added benefit of high protein. Packed in a convenient 200 ml tetra pack, it delivers 15g of protein per serving, making it an ideal drink for fitness enthusiasts, students, and busy professionals who want a nutritious boost on the go.

This lassi is made from quality milk solids and contains reduced sugar and low fat, offering a balanced and healthier option compared to regular sweet beverages. The pleasant rose flavour adds a mild floral sweetness, creating a smooth and refreshing taste experience. It is UHT processed and comes in hygienic, sealed packaging to ensure freshness and safety.

Perfect as a post-workout drink, midday refreshment, or quick breakfast addition, Amul Protein Lassi helps support muscle recovery and daily protein needs. It is ready to drink, easy to carry, and best enjoyed chilled for maximum refreshment and flavour.

name: Amul Protein Lassi – Plain
description:
Amul Protein Lassi – Plain is a nutritious and refreshing dairy beverage designed to support an active lifestyle. Each 200 ml pack delivers 15g of high-quality protein, helping meet daily protein requirements conveniently. Made from quality milk solids, this ready-to-drink lassi offers a smooth, creamy texture with a mild and balanced taste that suits those who prefer a less sweet option.

It contains reduced sugar and low fat, making it a healthier alternative to regular sugary drinks. The product is UHT processed and packed in a hygienic tetra pack, ensuring freshness, safety, and longer shelf life without the need for preservatives.

Ideal for post-workout recovery, busy mornings, or as a mid-day energy boost, Amul Protein Lassi supports muscle maintenance and overall nutrition. It is easy to carry, convenient to consume, and best enjoyed chilled. This plain variant pairs well with meals and is suitable for both adults and growing teenagers seeking extra protein intake.

name: Amul Lite – Milk Fat Based Spread
description:
Amul Lite Milk Fat Based Spread is a healthier alternative to regular butter, specially crafted for those who prefer a lighter option without compromising on taste. Made from milk fat and blended ingredients, this spread contains lower fat compared to traditional butter, making it suitable for calorie-conscious consumers. It offers a smooth, creamy texture that spreads easily on bread straight from the refrigerator.

Ideal for daily breakfast use, Amul Lite enhances the taste of toast, sandwiches, parathas, and rotis. It can also be used as a topping for corn, pav, and baked dishes. The product delivers a rich, buttery flavour while helping manage fat intake as part of a balanced diet.

Packed hygienically to maintain freshness and quality, it should be stored under refrigeration to preserve its texture and taste. Amul Lite is a convenient and tasty choice for families looking for a lighter spread option for everyday meals and snacks.

name: Amul Pure Ghee
description:
Amul Pure Ghee is a premium quality clarified butter made from fresh cream using traditional methods that preserve its rich aroma and authentic taste. Known for its golden colour and grainy texture, this ghee delivers the classic flavour that enhances Indian cooking. It is made from pure milk fat and contains no added preservatives, ensuring natural goodness and purity.

Whether used after a shower or before heading out, this lotion helps maintain supple skin with a subtle, fresh aroma.

name: Nivea Body Milk Nourishing Body Lotion
description:
The Nivea Body Milk Nourishing Body Milk is a rich, creamy body lotion specifically formulated to provide deep moisturisation and nourishment for dry to very dry skin. Enriched with ingredients like almond oil, vitamin E, and deep moisture serum, it penetrates the skin’s surface to replenish lost hydration and leave your skin feeling soft and supple throughout the day. This lotion helps support the skin’s natural barrier and can offer up to 48 hours of moisture, making it ideal for daily use after a shower or bath.

Suitable for both men and women, this body milk has a non-greasy, fast-absorbing formula that doesn’t leave a heavy or sticky residue, so you can dress immediately after application without discomfort. Its pleasant, mild fragrance adds a subtle scent while the hydrating components help soothe dry patches and rough skin. Regular use can result in visibly smoother and healthier-looking skin, especially in colder months or dry climates when skin tends to lose moisture more quickly. Overall, it’s a dependable everyday lotion for anyone needing reliable hydration and nourishment.

name: Cetaphil Daily Advance Ultra Hydrating Moisturizing Lotion
description:
The Cetaphil DAM Daily Advance Ultra Hydrating Lotion is a high-performance moisturiser specially formulated to care for dry and sensitive skin. Designed by dermatologists, this lotion features a unique epidermal replenishing complex of key nourishing ingredients such as shea butter, niacinamide (vitamin B3), panthenol (pro-vitamin B5), glycerin and sunflower oil to instantly replenish and lock in moisture. It’s clinically proven to provide up to 48 hours of hydration with a single application, helping restore the skin’s natural moisture barrier and protect against dryness.

What sets this lotion apart is its gentle, non-greasy, and fragrance-free formula, making it suitable even for those with sensitive or easily irritated skin. It’s also paraben-free, sulfate-free and hypoallergenic, so it won’t clog pores or cause irritation. Regular use helps soothe rough patches, improve overall skin texture, and leave your skin feeling soft, smooth, and comfortable all day long. Whether used on body or face, it’s a reliable everyday hydrator for dry, delicate skin.

name: 9SKIN Revive Day Moisturizing Cream
description:
The 9SKIN Revive Day Cream is a premium daily moisturiser crafted to hydrate, nourish and brighten your skin while protecting it from environmental stressors. Featuring a blend of powerful Ayurvedic botanical extracts such as Buah Merah (Papuan oil fruit), Ashwagandha and Kakadu Plum, this lightweight cream is designed to support skin that needs moisture without heaviness. Buah Merah is rich in antioxidants that help promote collagen production and reduce fine lines, while Ashwagandha’s anti-inflammatory properties soothe irritated skin and calm redness. Kakadu Plum, known for its exceptionally high vitamin C content, helps tighten pores and brighten your complexion.

The formula also includes other nourishing botanical butters and nano-extracts like safflower, mango butter, licorice and calendula, which work together to soften texture and enhance radiance throughout the day. Lightweight yet deeply hydrating, this day cream absorbs easily without feeling greasy, making it suitable for daily use as part of your morning skincare routine. Apply after cleansing (and serum, if used) before sunscreen to help lock in moisture and promote a smooth, glowing, healthy-looking complexion.

name: Dot & Key Ceramides Barrier Repair Moisturizer
description:
The Dot & Key Ceramides & Hyaluronic Barrier Repair Moisturizer is a daily nourishing cream designed to hydrate deeply and strengthen your skin’s natural barrier. Formulated with hyaluronic acid and 5 essential ceramides, it helps retain moisture while rebuilding and protecting the skin’s protective layer — especially beneficial for dry, sensitive, and combination skin types. Ceramides work by reinforcing the skin’s barrier to lock in hydration and prevent moisture loss, while hyaluronic acid attracts and holds water, ensuring lasting plumpness and supple texture.

This lightweight yet intense moisturiser also features probiotics and Japanese rice water, which soothe irritation and help balance the skin’s microbiome, reducing redness and discomfort over time. It’s fragrance-free, non-sticky, and non-comedogenic, so it absorbs quickly without clogging pores or leaving an oily finish — ideal for daily use under sunscreen or makeup.

Regular application helps restore smoothness, softness, and healthy radiance, making your complexion look hydrated and resilient even in dry or harsh weather conditions. Whether used morning or night, this barrier repair cream is a reliable choice for strengthening skin wellness and improving overall hydration.

name: Pond's Super Light Moisturizing Gel
description:
The Pond’s Hydra Miracle Super Light Gel Moisturizer is a refreshing daily hydrator designed especially for normal to oily and combination skin types. Its super-light gel texture absorbs quickly into the skin without leaving any greasy or heavy feel, making it ideal for humid climate conditions or use under makeup. The formula is enriched with Cera-Hyamino™ — a blend of ceramides and hyaluronic acid — which helps lock in moisture and maintain hydration for longer periods. Ceramides support the skin’s natural barrier, preventing dryness, while hyaluronic acid attracts and retains water molecules, helping the skin feel plump and smooth.

This gel moisturizer is particularly suited for those who want intense hydration without the thick cream consistency. It soothes and cools the skin on application, making it a good choice for hot weather or post-cleansing routines. Regular use helps improve skin texture and leaves the complexion looking more radiant and refreshed. The light, non-sticky finish ensures comfortable all-day wear, and its gentle formula is suitable for daily skincare routines.

name: Minimalist Vitamin B5 10% Gel Moisturizer
description:
The Minimalist Vitamin B5 10% Moisturizer is a targeted hydrator formulated to strengthen your skin’s moisture barrier while keeping oiliness in check. Designed primarily for oily and combination skin types, this lightweight, non-greasy cream features vitamin B5 (panthenol) at 10%, known for its excellent ability to attract and hold moisture in the skin. Vitamin B5 soothes irritation, supports skin repair, and enhances hydration without clogging pores, making it ideal for daily use.

In addition to vitamin B5, the formula includes essential minerals like copper, zinc, and magnesium, along with hyaluronic acid and betaine — all of which work together to improve skin hydration, calm sensitivity, and balance water levels throughout the day. Hyaluronic acid draws moisture into deeper skin layers, while betaine helps maintain softness and resilience.

This oil-free moisturizer absorbs quickly into the skin, leaving a fresh, smooth finish that’s perfect for layering under sunscreen or makeup. Regular use helps reduce dryness, refine skin texture, and maintain a healthy-looking complexion without heaviness. It’s a dependable everyday moisturizer for those seeking balanced hydration with skin-friendly ingredients.

name: Vaseline Intensive Care Deep Body Lotion (Long Lasting Moisturization For Healthy, Glowing Skin)
description:
The Vaseline Intensive Care Deep Moisture + 48 HR Lotion is a deeply nourishing body moisturizer designed to provide long-lasting hydration for dry skin. Formulated with a blend of ceramides and hyaluronic acid, it helps strengthen the skin’s natural moisture barrier while drawing in and locking moisture deep below the surface. Ceramides support the skin’s protective layer to prevent moisture loss, while hyaluronic acid attracts and retains water, helping skin feel soft, smooth, and supple throughout the day.

This lightweight, non-sticky lotion absorbs quickly, making it comfortable for daily use on arms, legs, and body. It’s especially effective in dry or harsh weather conditions when skin tends to lose moisture more rapidly. The non-greasy formula means you can apply after a shower and dress immediately without feeling weighed down.

With regular use, the lotion helps reduce dryness, improve skin texture, and leave your body feeling hydrated for up to 48 hours, helping maintain a healthy-looking glow. Whether you have chronically dry skin or just need extra nourishment after bathing, this Vaseline lotion delivers deep care without heaviness.

name: Plum Rice Water & 2% Niacinamide Face Moisturizing Gel
description:
The Plum Rice Water & Niacinamide Clear Moisture Gel Cream is a hydrating gel-based moisturiser formulated to deliver lightweight, refreshing moisture while improving skin clarity and texture. It features a blend of rice water extract and 2% niacinamide, two powerful ingredients known for their skin-beneficial properties. Rice water, rich in vitamins and minerals, helps to soothe and hydrate the skin, while niacinamide (vitamin B3) supports a brighter complexion, helps refine enlarged pores, and aids in strengthening the skin’s natural barrier.

This clear gel cream is ideal for normal, combination, and oily skin types, thanks to its non-greasy, easily absorbable texture that provides hydration without heaviness. The formula also contains gentle humectants that draw moisture into the skin, helping it stay soft and supple throughout the day.

Regular use of this moisturiser can help improve overall skin hydration, enhance radiance, and reduce dullness. Its lightweight feel makes it perfect for daily skincare routines, especially in warmer weather or humid climates, and it layers well under sunscreen or makeup for a smooth, fresh complexion.

name: Vaseline Petroleum Jelly (40 g)
description:
The Vaseline Skin Protecting Jelly (Original) is a classic and versatile skincare essential designed to lock in moisture and protect dry, flaky skin. Formulated with 100% pure petroleum jelly, this gentle, fragrance-free product creates a protective barrier on the skin’s surface, helping to prevent moisture loss and shield against dryness caused by wind, cold, or harsh environmental conditions. Its hypoallergenic and non-comedogenic formula makes it suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin.

This jelly can be used on multiple areas of the body — from rough elbows and dry knees to chapped lips, cracked heels, and even delicate areas like hands and cuticles. It’s also ideal for use on extremely dry patches that need extra nourishment and care. Because it’s so gentle and effective, many people use it as a daily moisturiser, overnight treatment, or to soothe irritation after shaving or waxing.

The texture is smooth and easily spreadable, melting into the skin to provide immediate relief. It’s a trusted household staple that delivers long-lasting hydration and protection wherever it’s applied.

name: Lacto Calamine Sunscreen (SPF 50 PA+++)
description:
The Lacto-Calamine Sunscreen SPF 50 PA+++ is a high-protection, dermatologist-tested sun cream designed to safeguard your skin from harmful UVA and UVB rays while keeping it fresh and shine-free. Formulated with SPF 50, it offers strong protection against sunburn, premature aging, and dark spots caused by prolonged sun exposure. Its kaolin clay base helps absorb excess oil and sweat, making it especially suitable for oily or combination skin types. The addition of lemon extracts brings natural antioxidants and vitamin C benefits that help brighten the complexion and enhance skin clarity over time.

This sunscreen is water-resistant and paraben-free, so it lasts on your skin even during outdoor activities or light sweating. The lightweight, non-greasy texture blends easily and doesn’t leave a white cast, making it a comfortable everyday choice under makeup or on bare skin.

Regular use of this sunscreen protects your skin’s moisture balance while helping prevent tanning, uneven skin tone, and sun-induced pigmentation. It’s an effective daily defence step for anyone looking to maintain healthy, protected, and radiant skin.

name: Lacto Calamine Face Lotion for Oily Skin
description:
The Lacto-Calamine Oil Control Face Lotion is a lightweight daily moisturiser specially formulated for oily and combination skin. Enriched with kaolin clay, this lotion helps absorb excess oil from the skin surface, reducing greasy shine while keeping your face hydrated and comfortable throughout the day. Kaolin clay is well-known for its ability to gently draw out impurities and control sebum production, making it an ideal ingredient for acne-prone or oily skin types.

This non-sticky, easy-to-apply lotion is dermatologically tested and paraben-free, so it suits sensitive skin without causing irritation. Its smooth texture spreads evenly and absorbs quickly, leaving behind a matte-finish that works well under makeup or sunscreen. Regular use helps maintain a balanced complexion by preventing oil build-up and minimising the appearance of enlarged pores.

Whether you’re managing daily shine or looking for a lightweight hydrating solution that won’t weigh your skin down, this face lotion is a reliable everyday choice. It delivers oil control and hydration in one formula, helping skin look fresher, clearer, and less oily throughout the day.

name: Cetaphil Gentle Skin Cleanser
description:
The Cetaphil Gentle Skin Cleanser is a mild, soap-free facial and body cleanser specially formulated for dry, normal, and sensitive skin. Its ultra-gentle formula cleanses without stripping the skin’s natural oils, helping to maintain the skin’s moisture balance during and after washing. This makes it an excellent choice for anyone with irritation-prone or easily sensitised skin. The cleanser is enriched with hydrating glycerin, essential vitamin B3 (niacinamide), and pro-vitamin B5, which work together to soothe and replenish moisture while effectively removing dirt, oil, and impurities.

Unlike harsher soaps, this Cetaphil cleanser won’t leave your skin feeling tight or dry — instead, it leaves a soft, comfortable feel that makes it ideal for daily use. The lightweight, non-foaming texture rinses off easily and is free from fragrance, parabens, and harsh detergents, reducing the risk of irritation. Its dermatologist-recommended formula is widely trusted by skincare professionals and suitable for sensitive skin types.

Whether used in the morning or evening, this gentle cleanser helps maintain healthy skin hydration while providing a clean, refreshed complexion. It’s especially beneficial for those with dryness, redness, or sensitivity, offering soothing care with every wash.

name: Simple Refreshing Face Wash
description:
The Simple Refreshing Facial Wash is a gentle, everyday cleanser designed to leave your skin feeling smooth, fresh, and clean without stripping it of essential moisture. Formulated especially for all skin types, this facial wash is 100% soap-free and free from harsh chemicals, colourants, or artificial perfume, making it ideal for sensitive skin. It contains a blend of pro-vitamin B5, vitamin E, and amino acids, which help support the skin’s natural protective barrier while thoroughly removing dirt, oil, and impurities from the surface.

This refreshing cleanser lathers lightly to sweep away daily pollutants and excess sebum without leaving your skin tight or dry. Its mild, balanced formula maintains the skin’s pH and supports hydration, resulting in a comfortable and fresh-feeling complexion after every wash. Regular use of this facial wash helps improve overall skin texture, reduce dullness, and enhance your natural glow without irritation.

Whether you use it in the morning to start your day or in the evening to remove makeup and grime, this Simple facial wash provides effective cleansing that’s kind to your skin — every day.

name: Mamaearth Vitamin C Face Wash 50 ml
description:
The Mamaearth Vitamin C Face Wash is a refreshing and gentle facial cleanser formulated to help brighten and illuminate your skin while removing daily dirt, oil, and impurities. Enriched with natural Vitamin C and turmeric extracts, this face wash helps reduce dullness and enhances your skin’s natural glow. Vitamin C is a powerful antioxidant that supports a more even skin tone and brighter complexion, while turmeric brings soothing and anti-inflammatory benefits that calm irritation and promote clearer skin.

Designed for all skin types, including sensitive skin, this face wash is dermatologically tested and made without harsh chemicals like parabens, silicones, sulfates, or artificial fragrance. Its creamy texture lathers gently without stripping the skin of essential moisture, leaving your face feeling clean, soft, and fresh after every wash.

Regular use of this Vitamin C-infused cleanser helps improve skin clarity, reduces dull patches, and supports a radiant, healthier-looking complexion. Whether used in the morning to kickstart your day or in the evening to remove dirt and pollutants, it’s an effective everyday face wash that supports your skin’s natural brightness and nourishment.

name: The Derma Co Sali-Cinamide Anti-Acne Face Wash
description:
The The Derma Co Sali-Cinamide Anti-Acne Face Wash is a targeted cleanser formulated to help manage acne-prone, oily and combination skin by combining two powerful actives: 2% salicylic acid and 2% niacinamide. Salicylic acid is a beta-hydroxy acid (BHA) that works deep inside pores to exfoliate dead skin cells, reduce clogging, and help control breakouts. Niacinamide (vitamin B3) supports the skin’s barrier function, calms inflammation, reduces redness, and helps minimise the appearance of enlarged pores — making this face wash a balanced but effective option for troubled skin.

This gentle yet effective cleanser lathers nicely to remove excess oil, dirt, pollution and makeup residue without overly drying out the skin. It’s dermatologically-inspired and suitable for regular use as part of your morning or evening skincare routine. With consistent use, it helps reduce blemishes, blackheads, and uneven texture while promoting a clearer, fresher complexion.

The formula is thoughtfully crafted for acne-prone skin, helping to keep skin calm, balanced, and less prone to frequent breakouts. Its combination of exfoliating and soothing agents makes it an excellent choice for those seeking a dependable anti-acne cleansing step in their daily regimen.

name: Lacto Calamine Face Wash for Oily Skin
description:
The Lacto-Calamine Face Wash is a gentle yet effective cleanser formulated to help deep-cleanse the skin while controlling excess oil and impurities. Enriched with kaolin clay, it acts like a magnet to draw out dirt, pollutants, and excess sebum from the skin’s surface, making it especially suitable for oily and combination skin types. The inclusion of niacinamide (vitamin B3) supports a clearer, more balanced complexion by helping minimise the appearance of enlarged pores and soothing irritation. Vitamin E adds antioxidant benefits that nourish the skin, helping it look healthier and more radiant over time.

The face wash lathers into a rich, creamy foam that removes daily grime without stripping the skin’s natural moisture, leaving your face feeling refreshed and clean. It’s paraben-free and gentle enough for regular daily use, making it a good choice for those who want both thorough cleansing and nourishment in one step.

With consistent use, this cleanser can help reduce dullness, excess oiliness, and uneven texture while promoting a smoother, fresher complexion. Whether you use it in the morning to kickstart your daily routine or in the evening to cleanse away the day’s build-up, this Lacto-Calamine face wash delivers a balanced cleansing experience that supports healthy, vibrant skin.

name: Nivea Men All-In-1 Charcoal Face Wash 100 g
description:
The NIVEA Men All-in-1 Charcoal Face Wash is a powerful daily cleanser designed specifically for men’s skin to deliver deep cleansing and revitalisation in one step. Enriched with activated charcoal, this face wash works like a magnet to draw out dirt, pollution, sweat, and excess oil from deep within the pores, helping prevent breakouts and leaving the skin feeling thoroughly refreshed. The formula also incorporates Gluta-AHA and Vitamin C, which help brighten the complexion and promote a more radiant, even-toned look over time.

This face wash offers a 3-in-1 action — it cleanses deeply, unclogs pores, and removes dull surface layers without over-drying the skin. Its rich, activating foam spreads easily and rinses off effortlessly, making it ideal for everyday use in the morning or evening. The inclusion of Vitamin C supports healthier skin by helping reduce roughness and fatigue caused by daily environmental stressors.

Whether you’re dealing with dullness, oily shine, or clogged pores, this NIVEA Men Charcoal Face Wash provides an effective, invigorating cleanse that helps your skin feel fresh, smooth, and ready for the day. description:
The Himalaya Purifying Neem Face Wash is a popular daily facial cleanser designed to help clear skin and prevent pimples with the power of natural neem extracts. Formulated with the goodness of five parts of neem, this face wash gently yet effectively cleanses away dirt, oil, and impurities to leave skin feeling fresh and purified. Neem has long been valued in traditional skincare for its antibacterial and soothing properties, making this formula particularly beneficial for acne-prone and oily skin types.

This face wash is soap-free and skin-friendly, helping maintain your skin’s natural moisture balance rather than stripping it away. It produces a light, creamy lather that rinses off easily, leaving your skin feeling clean and refreshed without tightness or dryness. Regular use can help reduce the appearance of breakouts and blemishes, promote clearer skin, and improve overall texture.

Whether you’re battling everyday pollution or occasional breakouts, the Himalaya Neem Face Wash works to support healthier-looking skin by reducing excess oil and helping keep pores clean. Its gentle formulation also makes it suitable for regular use in your morning and evening skincare routine, helping you maintain a clear, refreshed complexion with the natural benefits of neem.

name: The Derma Co 1% Kojic Acid Face Wash

The The Derma Co 1% Kojic Acid Daily Face Wash is a targeted skincare cleanser formulated to help reduce dark spots, pigmentation, and uneven skin tone with its blend of effective brightening ingredients. This face wash features 1% kojic acid, a well-known skin-brightening agent that helps fade stubborn pigmentation and sun-induced dark patches. It also includes 1% niacinamide, which supports a more even complexion and strengthens the skin’s natural barrier, and alpha arbutin, a gentle yet powerful ingredient that further boosts skin clarity by inhibiting melanin formation.

Designed for daily use, this face wash creates a gentle but effective lather that removes dirt, oil, and makeup without stripping the skin of essential moisture. Its dermatologically-tested and fragrance-free formulation makes it suitable for most skin types, including sensitive skin.

Regular use can help promote a more radiant, luminous complexion while improving skin texture over time. Whether your primary concern is dark spots, dullness, or pigmentation from sun exposure, this face wash combines exfoliating and brightening effects in a single, easy-to-use step.
