name: India Gate Mogra Basmati Rice 5 Kg (Short Grain) (Basmati Arisi)
description:
India Gate Mogra Basmati Rice is a smart choice for families looking for aromatic and flavorful basmati rice at an everyday price. Carefully selected from trusted basmati-growing regions, this rice offers medium to long grains that cook soft, fluffy, and non-sticky. It delivers a pleasant fragrance and satisfying texture, making daily meals more enjoyable.

The grains expand well after cooking and remain separate, giving your dishes a neat and appetizing appearance. It is ideal for preparing steamed rice, jeera rice, pulao, khichdi, and light biryani. Its balanced taste pairs perfectly with dals, curries, gravies, and vegetable dishes, making it a versatile addition to your kitchen.

Processed under strict quality standards, India Gate ensures purity, consistency, and reliable cooking results in every pack. Whether you are preparing a simple lunch or a family dinner, India Gate Mogra Basmati Rice provides dependable quality, good aroma, and wholesome taste, ensuring satisfying meals every time for you and your loved ones.

name: Aachi Turmeric PowderHaldi (Manjal Podi)
description: Aachi Turmeric Powder is a premium quality spice made from carefully selected turmeric fingers to ensure rich color, strong aroma, and high curcumin content. Sourced from trusted farms, the turmeric is hygienically processed and finely ground to maintain its natural flavor and nutritional value. Its bright golden-yellow color enhances the appearance of dishes while adding a warm, earthy taste that is essential in Indian cooking. Ideal for curries, gravies, rice dishes, and traditional recipes, this turmeric powder blends easily and delivers consistent flavor in every spoon. Apart from culinary uses, turmeric is well known for its traditional health benefits and is commonly used in home remedies and skincare practices. The 100g pack is convenient for regular household use and comes in secure packaging to retain freshness and purity. Aachi ensures strict quality control standards, making it a trusted choice for families seeking authentic taste and superior quality in everyday cooking.

name: Sakthi Red Chilli Powder (Milagai Podi)
description: Sakthi Chilli Powder is made from carefully selected, high-quality dried red chillies to deliver vibrant color, rich aroma, and consistent heat in every spoon. The chillies are hygienically cleaned, sun-dried, and finely ground using advanced processing methods to retain their natural pungency and freshness. Its bright red shade enhances the visual appeal of curries, gravies, marinades, and traditional South Indian dishes. Ideal for everyday cooking, this chilli powder blends smoothly to provide balanced spiciness and depth of flavor. Whether used in sambar, kuzhambu, masala blends, or snacks, it adds authentic taste and aroma to your recipes. Packed in a secure, moisture-resistant pouch, the 100g pack ensures long-lasting freshness and convenience for regular household use. Sakthi Masala follows strict quality standards, making it a trusted choice among families. With its bold flavor and premium quality, Sakthi Chilli Powder is a must-have spice in every kitchen for delicious and flavorful meals.

name: Everest Kashmiri Red Chilli Powder (Milagai Podi)
description: Everest Kashmiri Lal Brilliant Red Chilli Powder is specially crafted to give your dishes a vibrant red color with mild pungency. Made from premium quality Kashmiri chillies, this spice is carefully selected, cleaned, and ground under strict hygienic conditions to preserve its natural flavor and color. It is widely used to enhance the appearance of curries, tandoori dishes, gravies, and marinades without making them overly spicy. The rich red hue adds an appetizing look to both vegetarian and non-vegetarian recipes, making it a favorite choice in Indian kitchens. Its smooth texture ensures easy blending, delivering consistent taste and color in every serving. Packed in a sturdy, airtight box, the 100g pack retains freshness and aroma for a longer period. Everest follows high quality standards and advanced processing techniques to ensure purity and authenticity. Ideal for everyday cooking, this chilli powder brings restaurant-style color and flavor to your homemade dishes effortlessly.

name: Aachi Biryani Masala (Biriyani Masala)
description: Aachi Briyani Masala is a carefully blended spice mix crafted to bring authentic taste and rich aroma to your homemade biryani. Made from high-quality spices such as coriander, chilli, fennel, cinnamon, cloves, and cardamom, this masala delivers a perfect balance of flavor and fragrance. Each ingredient is hygienically processed and finely ground to preserve its natural oils and freshness. Whether you are preparing vegetable, chicken, or mutton biryani, this masala enhances the taste with traditional South Indian style richness. Its well-balanced spice level ensures a delicious and aromatic dish without overpowering heat. The 100g pack is ideal for regular household cooking and comes in secure packaging to maintain quality and freshness for a longer time. Aachi follows strict quality control standards to ensure purity and consistency in every pack. With Aachi Briyani Masala, you can easily prepare flavorful, restaurant-style biryani at home for family meals and special occasions.

name: Sakthi Chicken Masala
description: Sakthi Chicken Masala is a flavorful spice blend specially crafted to prepare delicious and aromatic chicken dishes at home. Made from a balanced combination of premium spices such as coriander, chilli, cumin, pepper, fennel, cinnamon, cloves, and cardamom, this masala enhances the natural taste of chicken with rich aroma and authentic flavor. The ingredients are carefully selected, cleaned, and hygienically processed to maintain freshness and quality. Ideal for preparing chicken curry, gravy, roast, and other traditional recipes, this masala ensures consistent taste in every serving. Its fine texture allows easy blending, giving your dish a smooth and well-balanced spice profile without overpowering heat. The convenient 50g pack is perfect for small families and regular cooking needs. Packed securely to retain freshness, Sakthi Chicken Masala follows strict quality standards to ensure purity and authenticity. With this trusted spice mix, you can easily prepare restaurant-style chicken dishes full of taste and aroma.

name: Sakthi Chilli 65 Chicken Masala
description: Sakthi Chilli Chicken 65 Masala is a specially blended spice mix crafted to prepare delicious, restaurant-style Chicken 65 at home. Made by Sakthi Masala, a trusted Indian spice brand, this masala delivers a perfect balance of heat, aroma, and authentic South Indian flavor. The blend combines premium quality red chillies, aromatic spices, and seasoning ingredients to give chicken a vibrant color and rich taste. Ideal for deep-fried or shallow-fried preparations, it enhances both texture and flavor, making your dish crispy outside and juicy inside. Simply marinate chicken pieces with this masala along with curd or water, rest for some time, and fry to perfection. It is suitable for home cooking, small gatherings, and festive occasions. The convenient 50g pack ensures freshness and easy storage. Whether served as a starter or snack, Sakthi Chilli Chicken 65 Masala guarantees a spicy, flavorful experience loved by all ages.

name: Sakthi Biryani Masala (Biriyani Masala)
description: Sakthi Biriyani Masala is a premium spice blend specially crafted to prepare flavorful and aromatic biriyani at home. Produced by Sakthi Masala, a trusted Indian spice brand, this masala combines carefully selected spices to deliver authentic taste and rich aroma. The blend includes high-quality ingredients that enhance the flavor of rice, vegetables, chicken, or mutton, giving your biriyani a traditional South Indian touch. It adds perfect balance of spice, warmth, and fragrance, ensuring every grain of rice is infused with delicious taste. Ideal for home cooking, family gatherings, and festive occasions, this masala simplifies biriyani preparation without compromising on quality. Just add the required quantity while cooking to achieve restaurant-style results. The convenient 50g pack ensures freshness and easy storage. Whether preparing vegetarian or non-vegetarian biriyani, Sakthi Biriyani Masala helps you create a satisfying, flavorful dish that everyone will enjoy.

name: Fabelle Dessert Truffles Luxury Chocolate Gift Pack
description:
Indulge in the luxurious taste of Fabelle handcrafted chocolates, a premium assortment crafted for true chocolate connoisseurs. This elegant gift box features a curated selection of artisanal pralines and truffles, each made with the finest cocoa, rich fillings, and delicate flavor infusions. From smooth ganache centers to crunchy nut pralines and velvety caramel blends, every bite delivers a perfectly balanced taste and texture.

Beautifully packed in a sophisticated blue and gold box, this collection makes an ideal gift for celebrations, anniversaries, birthdays, or festive occasions. The chocolates are carefully handcrafted to ensure superior quality, refined flavor, and a melt-in-the-mouth experience.

Whether you’re sharing with loved ones or treating yourself, this premium chocolate box elevates every moment into a celebration of indulgence. Experience world-class craftsmanship and gourmet excellence in every piece, designed to delight both the eyes and the palate.

name: Fabelle Open Secret Milk Chocolate Bar
description:
Experience the rich indulgence of Fabelle Open Secret – Milk Chocolate Topped with Nuts & Berries, a premium treat crafted for chocolate lovers. This exquisite milk chocolate bar features a smooth, creamy base generously topped with crunchy almonds, pistachios, cashews, and vibrant berries for a delightful burst of flavor in every bite.

Each square is thoughtfully designed to combine texture and taste — the sweetness of fine milk chocolate perfectly balanced with the nuttiness of roasted dry fruits and the tangy hint of berries. The “Open Secret” concept showcases visible, high-quality toppings, making every piece visually appealing and irresistibly delicious.

Beautifully packed in an elegant box, this chocolate makes a wonderful gift for special occasions, festive celebrations, or personal indulgence. Whether shared with loved ones or enjoyed alone, it delivers a gourmet experience with premium ingredients and refined craftsmanship that elevates everyday chocolate into a luxurious delight.

name: 34) Key features Chocolate Type Milk Chocolate Flavour Hazlenut Shelf Life 9 months Ferrero Rocher Chocolate Gift Pack (16 pieces)
description:
Indulge in the timeless luxury of Ferrero Rocher, a premium chocolate crafted to delight your senses. Each golden-wrapped piece features a whole crunchy hazelnut at its heart, surrounded by a smooth hazelnut cream filling and encased in a delicate wafer shell. The outer layer is coated in rich milk chocolate and finely chopped hazelnuts, creating a perfect balance of crispiness and creaminess in every bite.

Elegantly packed in a transparent box with signature gold accents, this collection is ideal for gifting on birthdays, anniversaries, festive celebrations, or special moments. The sophisticated presentation and exquisite taste make it a symbol of appreciation and indulgence.

Whether shared with loved ones or enjoyed as a personal treat, Ferrero Rocher delivers a refined chocolate experience. Its harmonious blend of textures and flavors makes every piece irresistibly delicious, turning ordinary moments into celebrations of sweetness and luxury.

name: Cadbury Studio Assorted Flavours Signature Pralines Chocolate Gift Pack
description:
Indulge in the rich elegance of Cadbury Studio Signature Pralines – Assorted Flavours, a premium chocolate collection crafted for refined taste. This luxurious box features an assortment of smooth pralines filled with delectable nutty and creamy centers, delivering a delightful blend of textures and flavors in every bite. Each chocolate is expertly crafted using high-quality cocoa and carefully selected ingredients to create a perfectly balanced sweetness with a rich, velvety finish.

Presented in a vibrant and sophisticated purple box, this collection makes an excellent gift for festive celebrations, birthdays, anniversaries, or special occasions. The elegant packaging enhances its premium appeal, making it a thoughtful gesture for loved ones or corporate gifting.

Whether you are sharing joyful moments with family or savoring a personal treat, Cadbury Studio Signature Pralines offer a gourmet chocolate experience. Enjoy the harmonious fusion of creamy chocolate and crunchy nuts, crafted to transform everyday moments into indulgent celebrations.

name: Sapphire Butter Biscuits Gift Pack (Gold Collection)
description:
Enjoy the rich, melt-in-the-mouth taste of Sapphire Butter Cookies – Gold Collection (350g), crafted using an original Danish-inspired recipe. These premium butter cookies are made with high-quality ingredients to deliver a perfectly balanced sweetness and a smooth, crumbly texture in every bite. Each tin features an assortment of classic shapes and delicate designs, offering a variety of textures from crisp and crunchy to soft and buttery.

Packed in an elegant red and gold reusable tin, this collection is perfect for festive gifting, celebrations, or serving guests at home. The airtight packaging helps maintain freshness and flavor, ensuring every cookie tastes just as delightful as the first.

Whether paired with tea or coffee, shared with family, or gifted during special occasions, Sapphire Butter Cookies bring warmth and sweetness to every moment. Indulge in a timeless treat that combines tradition, quality, and irresistible buttery goodness.

name: Amul 55% Cocoa Dark Chocolate Bar
description: Amul 55% Cocoa Dark Chocolate Bar is a rich and smooth premium chocolate crafted for true dark chocolate lovers. Made with 55% cocoa solids, this bar offers the perfect balance between intense cocoa flavor and mild sweetness. Its deep, bold taste and smooth texture make it ideal for those who enjoy a slightly bitter yet satisfying chocolate experience. Carefully prepared using high-quality cocoa ingredients, this chocolate delivers a delightful melt-in-the-mouth feel with every bite. It can be enjoyed as a standalone treat, paired with coffee, or used in baking desserts like brownies, cakes, and cookies. The balanced cocoa percentage ensures a refined flavor that is neither too sweet nor overly bitter. Packed hygienically to retain freshness and aroma, Amul 55% Cocoa Dark Chocolate Bar is perfect for gifting, sharing, or indulging in a premium chocolate moment anytime. A delicious treat for everyday enjoyment and special occasions alike.

name: Cadbury Bournville Rich Cocoa 50% Dark Chocolate Bar - Pack of 2
description:
The Cadbury Bournville Rich Cocoa 50% Dark Chocolate Bar – Pack of 2 offers a classic and satisfying dark chocolate experience for those who enjoy a milder bitterness in their cocoa treats. Made with 50% rich cocoa content, this twin-pack brings a balanced chocolate flavour that sits between milk and high-percentage dark chocolates, appealing to both casual snackers and budding dark-chocolate fans.

Each bar combines deeply roasted cocoa with a subtle sweetness to create a smooth texture and lingering taste that’s not too intense, making it a great everyday indulgence. The chocolate’s recipe includes quality ingredients like cocoa solids and cocoa butter, blended with milk solids and emulsifiers to achieve a velvety finish and perfect snap.

Packaged conveniently for sharing or portion-controlled snacking, this Bournville Rich Cocoa twin-pack is ideal for gifting, adding to dessert recipes, pairing with hot coffee or tea, or simply enjoying on its own. Its approachable flavour makes it a favourite option for those transitioning from sweeter chocolates to darker, richer profiles.

name: Galaxy Fusions Dark Chocolate Bar with 70% Cocoa
description:
The Galaxy Fusions Dark Chocolate Bar with 70% Cocoa is a richly indulgent dark chocolate crafted for those who appreciate a deeper cocoa experience without overwhelming bitterness. Made with a minimum of 70% cocoa solids, this bar strikes a satisfying balance between bold flavour and smooth texture — delivering an intense chocolate taste that’s perfect for dark chocolate lovers.

Luxuriously smooth on the palate, the chocolate melts gently, releasing nuanced cocoa notes with a hint of natural sweetness to round out the deeper dark profile. Its refined texture and rich aroma make it ideal as a standalone treat or a thoughtful gift.

Beyond snacking, this dark chocolate bar can elevate your baking — adding intensity to brownies, cookies, or dessert sauces — or pair beautifully with coffee or red wine for a sophisticated flavour experience.

Packaged for freshness and enjoyment, the Galaxy Fusions Dark Chocolate Bar is a go-to choice for anyone seeking a decadent yet balanced dark chocolate moment.

name: Hershey's Dark Dark Chocolate Bar
description:
The Hershey's Dark Dark Chocolate Bar is a classic dark chocolate treat from Hershey’s, designed for those who enjoy a bolder cocoa flavour compared to traditional milk chocolate. Carefully made with rich, dark cocoa solids and cocoa butter, this bar delivers a deeper chocolate experience that’s slightly less sweet and more intense than standard chocolate bars, appealing both to dark chocolate enthusiasts and casual snackers alike.

With a smooth and velvety texture, this dark bar melts gently on the palate, releasing rich chocolate notes that are robust yet balanced. Its versatile flavour makes it perfect for snacking straight from the wrapper, pairing with coffee or tea, or even incorporating into dessert recipes to add depth and richness. While not as high in cocoa percentage as premium craft bars, its accessible taste and trusted brand quality make it a popular choice among everyday chocolate lovers.

Packaged to retain freshness and aroma, the Hershey’s Dark Dark Chocolate Bar offers an enjoyable and satisfying chocolate break any time of day.

name: McVitie's Digestive High Fibre Biscuit
description:
McVitie's Digestive High Fibre Biscuits With Goodness Of Wholewheat are a classic—popular snack biscuits known for being high in dietary fibre and made with wholewheat, designed to support digestion and satisfy between-meal hunger. They’re part of the famed McVitie’s Digestive range, originally developed to offer a slightly coarse, crunchy texture that pairs perfectly with tea or coffee.

The biscuits are made from a blend of wheat flour, wholemeal wheat flour, and other simple ingredients, providing a balance of taste and nutrition. They are marketed as trans-fat-free, and the fibre content comes mainly from the wheat and bran components, which help promote regular bowel movements and support gut health when included as part of a balanced diet.

These biscuits work well as a light snack option for casual eating or on-the-go, appealing to individuals who want something tastier and more nutritious than plain cookies. While they do contain some sugar and refined flour in many variants, they offer a more wholesome choice than standard sweet biscuits.

name: Sunfeast Farmlite Oats & Almonds Cookies
description:
Sunfeast Farmlite Oats & Almonds Cookies are a popular snack biscuit from Sunfeast positioned as a healthier alternative to regular cookies. These biscuits combine the crunchy texture of oats with the nutty flavour of almonds, making them enjoyable with tea or coffee or as an on-the-go snack.

One of the key selling points of this variant is that it is maida-free and trans-fat-free, and incorporates rolled oats and wheat flour (atta) to provide dietary fibre, which can help you feel full longer. The inclusion of almond pieces adds a pleasant nutty aroma and slight crunch, while the oats contribute a subtle wholesome sweetness and texture.

Sunfeast Farmlite cookies are generally suitable for vegetarians and intended as a lighter snack compared to typical sugary biscuits. They strike a balance between taste and perceived nutrition, though they still contain sugar and refined oils. Their affordable price and familiar taste make them a common choice in Indian households looking for everyday snack options with a bit more fibre than plain biscuits.

name: Britannia NutriChoice Ragi Cookies (Diabetic Friendly)
description:
Britannia NutriChoice Ragi Cookies (Diabetic Friendly) are health-oriented cookies crafted by Britannia with a focus on providing a diabetic-friendly snacking option. These cookies are made using ragi (finger millet) flour, which is naturally rich in dietary fibre and has a low glycemic index (GI)—meaning it causes a slower rise in blood sugar levels compared to regular sweet biscuits.

A key feature of these cookies is that they are generally made with zero added sugar and no maida (refined wheat flour), making them suitable for people with diabetes or those seeking a healthier alternative to traditional sugary snacks. The high fibre content not only helps support gut health but also contributes to sustained energy release, helping to keep you feeling full longer between meals.

With a lightly crisp texture and a mild, nutty ragi flavour, these cookies pair well with tea or coffee and make for an everyday snacking choice for health-conscious individuals. Although marketed as diabetic friendly, they should still be eaten in moderation as part of a balanced diet.

name: Britannia NutriChoice 5 Grain Digestive Biscuit
description:
Britannia NutriChoice 5 Grain Digestive Biscuits are multigrain, high-fibre digestive biscuits designed as a healthier snacking option compared to regular sweet biscuits. They are made from a blend of five grains — typically wheat (atta), oats, ragi (finger millet), corn, and rice — providing a source of dietary fibre that supports digestion and helps you feel fuller between meals. The recipe also includes a small amount of honey for a natural hint of sweetness and contains zero trans fat and no maida (refined flour), making it relatively wholesome for everyday snacking.

The biscuits have a crunchy texture and a mildly sweet, multigrain flavour that pairs well with tea or coffee. While they are marketed as a “healthier” biscuit due to the added fibre and grains, they still contain sugar and fat, so moderation is recommended as part of a balanced diet. These biscuits are popular as an evening snack or quick bite for those looking for something more nutritious than traditional sweet biscuits

name: Sunfeast Farmlite 5 Grain High Fibre Digestive Biscuit
description:
The Sunfeast Farmlite 5 Grain High Fibre Digestive Biscuit is a multigrain digestive snack produced by Sunfeast (ITC) that’s positioned as a healthier alternative to regular biscuits. Made with the goodness of five grains — typically ragi (finger millet), oats, jowar (sorghum), corn and wheat — it offers a higher dietary fibre content which supports digestion and can help you feel full longer.

Unlike many standard sweet biscuits, this version contains no maida (refined flour) and is baked rather than fried, giving it a crunchy texture and making it suitable as a tea-time snack or quick bite between meals.

The flavour is mildly sweet with a grainy, wholesome profile owing to the mixed grains. While marketed as a high-fibre option, it still contains sugar and calories typical of biscuits, so it’s best enjoyed in moderation as part of a balanced diet. People often pair it with tea or coffee, use it as a breakfast accompaniment, or simply eat it straight from the pack for a satisfying snack.

name: Coca-Cola Zero Sugar Soft Drink
description:
Coca-Cola Zero Sugar is the sugar-free version of the classic Coca-Cola soft drink, engineered to give consumers the iconic cola flavour without the calories that come from sugar. Instead of sugar, it uses artificial sweeteners to provide sweetness with nearly zero calories, making it suitable for people watching their calorie intake or managing sugar consumption. The flavour profile stays close to traditional Coca-Cola, with a crisp, fizzy sensation and that familiar cola aroma.

This beverage is widely available in various pack sizes in India, with MRPs commonly seen around ₹40 for single bottles or cans (300 ml or 750 ml) and around ₹160 for packs of smaller bottles (like 8×250 ml). The drink is marketed as a refreshing, guilt-free option for parties, meals, or everyday refreshment. Always check the actual printed MRP on the bottle or can before purchase, as prices can differ by region or retailer, and offers may lower the selling price further.

name: Monster Zero Sugar Ultra Energy Drink
description:
Monster Zero Sugar Ultra is a sugar-free energy drink variant from Monster, designed for people who want an energizing boost without the calories and sugar found in conventional energy drinks. It combines Monster’s signature energy blend — including caffeine, B-vitamins, taurine, and other energy-supporting ingredients — with a lighter flavour profile that’s typically described as refreshing and citrus-like.

Unlike full-sugar energy drinks, this zero-sugar formulation uses artificial sweeteners to maintain sweetness without added sugar or significant calories, appealing to health-conscious consumers or those watching their calorie intake. The drink is usually available in 350 ml cans in India, and some larger 500 ml imported versions also circulate through specialty retailers.

Monster Zero Sugar Ultra is popular among students, professionals, athletes, and gamers who need a quick hit of energy to stay focused and alert, making it a go-to choice before workouts, long study sessions, or demanding work shifts. Always consume energy drinks responsibly — especially if you are sensitive to caffeine, pregnant, or have health conditions.

name: Red Bull Energy Drink
description:
RED BULL Energy Drink 250 ml is a globally popular energy drink originally from Austria, known for its slogan “Red Bull gives you wings.” It’s formulated to help boost energy, improve alertness, and reduce tiredness when you need a quick pick-me-up, whether during long work hours, workouts, travel, or study sessions.

The drink’s key ingredients typically include caffeine, taurine, and B-group vitamins, along with sugars that provide fast-acting energy. The standard 250 ml can has an MRP of around ₹125 in India, while larger 350 ml cans are usually priced around ₹145–₹165. Red Bull also comes in various editions and flavours, including sugar-free and fruit-flavoured variants.

Because it contains high levels of caffeine, it’s best consumed responsibly — not recommended for children, pregnant people, or those sensitive to stimulants. Overall, Red Bull remains one of the most widely recognised energy drink brands worldwide and is enjoyed by millions seeking a quick energy boost.

name: Coca-Cola Diet Coke Soft Drink
description:
Coca-Cola Diet Coke is a sugar-free variant of the classic Coca-Cola soft drink that delivers a crisp, refreshing cola flavour with minimal calories (less than 1 per can) and no sugar, making it a popular choice for calorie-conscious consumers. Unlike regular cola drinks that derive sweetness from sugar, Diet Coke uses artificial sweeteners, providing a light taste and sparkling mouthfeel while allowing people to enjoy the iconic Coca-Cola flavour without the added calories.

This drink is typically available in 300 ml cans in India, with an MRP around ₹40 per can. It’s often enjoyed chilled on its own, paired with meals such as pizzas and burgers, or served at social gatherings where a refreshing and guilt-free soft drink option is preferred. The presence of caffeine gives a mild energy boost, while the absence of sugar makes it suitable for those managing sugar intake. As with all artificially sweetened beverages, moderation is recommended — especially for people sensitive to caffeine or sweeteners — but many fans appreciate Diet Coke as a lighter alternative to full-sugar sodas.

name: Sprite Zero Soft Drink
description:
Sprite Zero is a sugar-free version of the classic lemon-lime soda from the Sprite brand, designed for people who want a refreshing fizzy drink without the calories and sugar. Like regular Sprite, it delivers a crisp, zesty lemon-lime flavour with lively carbonation, but the formulation replaces sugar with artificial sweeteners to achieve near-zero calories. This makes Sprite Zero a popular choice for calorie-conscious consumers or anyone managing their sugar intake but still craving a refreshing soft drink.

In India, Sprite Zero is commonly available in 300 ml or 330 ml cans and larger bottles like 750 ml, with MRPs typically printed around ₹40–₹50 per can or bottle. The drink is best served chilled and pairs well with meals, snacks, or as a standalone thirst-quencher on a hot day. Its clean, citrus flavour and brisk fizziness make it ideal for casual occasions, social gatherings, or as a mixer in mocktails and cocktails. While Sprite Zero contains artificial sweeteners instead of sugar, moderate consumption is generally considered fine for most people, though those with specific dietary concerns should check ingredients.

name: Thums Up Soft Drink
description:
Thums Up is a classic carbonated cola soft drink originating from India and now marketed by The Coca-Cola Company. It was first introduced in 1977 and has become one of the country’s most popular cola brands with a reputation for its bold, strong flavour and spicy fizz that sets it apart from typical colas.

The drink contains carbonated water, sugar, acidity regulators, caffeine, flavours, and caramel colour, giving it a distinctive cola taste with a punchy kick and robust mouthfeel. Thums Up’s marketing often emphasizes adventure, energy, and a masculine, no-nonsense style, reflected in its long-standing tagline “Taste the Thunder.”

In India, Thums Up is widely available in various sizes like 300 ml cans, 750 ml bottles, and larger bottles up to 2.25 L, with MRPs generally around ₹40–₹100 depending on size. Multipacks like 8×250 ml bottles are often priced around ₹160 total, making it an affordable choice for parties, meals, or everyday refreshment. Its bold cola profile and broad availability have helped it remain a favourite among cola drinkers across generations.

name: 7UP Lime Soft Drink
description:
7UP is a classic lemon-lime flavoured carbonated soft drink known for its light, crisp, and refreshing taste. It’s caffeine-free and widely enjoyed as a thirst-quencher, especially in warm weather or with meals. The flavour combines bright lemon and lime notes with lively bubbles, giving a clean and zesty soda experience that appeals to a broad range of consumers.

In India, 7UP is available in various pack sizes — from small 250 ml or 300 ml bottles/cans to 750 ml bottles and larger 2.25 L family packs — with printed MRPs usually between ₹20 and ₹40 for standard sizes. Because it contains sugar (unless you choose a sugar-free variant), it provides a quick burst of sweetness and fizz, making it a popular choice at parties, picnics, and casual occasions.

7UP is also versatile — it’s often served chilled on its own, mixed into mocktails or cocktails, or paired with snacks and meals. Its mild lemon-lime profile makes it a refreshing alternative to heavier cola drinks.

name: Mirinda Soft Drink
description:
Mirinda is a popular orange-flavoured carbonated soft drink produced by PepsiCo and widely enjoyed in India and many other countries. It’s known for its bright, tangy orange taste, fizzy texture, and refreshing feel, making it a favourite during hot weather, social gatherings, parties, or as a casual thirst-quencher. The flavour combines citrus sweetness with bubbly carbonation that energises the palate, and it’s traditionally served well-chilled for the best taste.

Mirinda is available in multiple pack sizes — from small 250 ml and 300 ml bottles/cans to 750 ml, 1.25 L, and 2.25 L bottles — with printed MRPs typically ranging from around ₹20–₹40 for smaller packs and ₹60–₹90 for larger family sizes in India. Its vibrant orange colour, bold fruity aroma, and lively fizz make Mirinda a go-to choice for both kids and adults who prefer fruit-flavoured sodas over cola-based soft drinks. Mirinda’s marketing often highlights fun, spontaneity, and refreshment, aligning with casual and youthful occasions.

name: Pepsi Soft Drink
description:
Pepsi is one of the most recognised cola-flavoured carbonated soft drinks produced by PepsiCo, enjoyed widely across India and around the world. It’s known for its sweet, fizzy cola taste with a refreshing kick of carbonation, making it a classic choice with meals, snacks, or chilled on its own. Unlike lemon-lime sodas, Pepsi’s signature flavour combines caramel sweetness with a smooth cola profile, balanced caffeine content, and lively bubbles, appealing to both younger and older soft-drink drinkers.

In India, Pepsi is sold in various common sizes — from small 300 ml cans and 750 ml bottles to larger 1.25 L, 1.5 L, and 2 L bottles — with printed MRPs generally ranging from around ₹20–₹40 for small bottles/cans and higher for larger sizes. The drink contains carbonated water, sugar, acidity regulators, natural flavourings, caramel colour, and caffeine, giving it both energy and flavour. Although it contains sugar, it remains a staple refreshment at parties, gatherings, and day-to-day consumption due to its familiar cola profile and effervescent feel.

Pepsi also often comes in other variants like diet or zero-sugar versions for those watching their calorie intake. Whether paired with fast food or simply chilled after a long day, Pepsi continues to be a popular soft drink choice across generations.

name: Appy Fizz Sparkling Drink (Apple Flavoured)
description:
Appy Fizz Apple Flavoured Sparkling Drink : 600 ml is a popular apple-flavoured sparkling soft drink made and marketed in India by Parle Agro. It was one of the first fizzy apple-juice-based drinks introduced in the Indian market, offering a crisp, bubbly experience that combines the sweetness and fruitiness of apple with lively carbonation.

Unlike typical fruit juices, Appy Fizz blends real apple juice with carbonated water and sugar, creating a refreshing drink that’s often served well chilled on hot days, during meals, parties, picnics, or casual gatherings. Its flavour profile is mildly sweet with a tangy apple note and a fizzy finish, making it a favourite among kids, teenagers, and soft-drink lovers looking for something different from standard cola and lemon-lime sodas.

Appy Fizz is available in multiple pack sizes, from small bottles (~125–160 ml) to mid-size bottles and cans (~250–600 ml) and larger 1 L bottles, with printed MRPs usually ranging from around ₹9–₹60 depending on size. Always check the printed MRP on the package before buying, as local retail prices or discounts can differ.

name: A2B Andhra Murukku Namkeen
description:
A2B Andhra Murukku is a classic South Indian crispy and savoury namkeen snack traditionally associated with the flavours of Andhra Pradesh. It’s made from a mix of rice flour, urad dal or wheat flour, spices, and seasonings, which are twisted into coiled shapes and then deep-fried to achieve a light, crunchy texture. This snack delivers a spicy, flavourful punch with every bite, making it a popular choice with tea, coffee, or as a casual munch during gatherings or travel.

The snack is offered by A2B (Adyar Ananda Bhavan) — a well-known South Indian brand that’s famous for a wide range of snacks, sweets, and ready-to-eat items. name: Haldiram's Nagpur Aloo Bhujia
description:
Haldiram’s Nagpur Aloo Bhujia is a classic Indian crunchy snack known for its spicy, savoury flavour and crispy texture. Made primarily from potatoes and gram flour (besan) along with a blend of aromatic spices, these fine, golden-fried strands deliver a satisfying crunch with every bite. It’s versatile and can be enjoyed on its own, paired with tea or coffee, or even used as a crunchy topping on chaat, salads, or rice dishes.

name: Bikaji Bhujia
description:
Bikaji Bhujia is a classic Indian savoury snack with roots in Bikaner, Rajasthan, and is one of the most widely recognised traditional namkeen items in India. It’s made from a blend of gram flour (besan), moth dal flour, spices, and seasonings, which are shaped into fine strands and deep-fried to a crunchy and satisfying texture. The result is a crispy, spicy, and flavourful munching experience that pairs well with tea or coffee, or can be enjoyed as a standalone snack anytime.

This snack is deeply rooted in Indian snacking culture and is especially popular during festivals, parties, picnics, and casual gatherings. Bhujia’s spicy kick — often balanced with aromatic spices — makes it versatile for both young and adult taste buds. It’s also commonly used as a topping on chaats, salads, upma, or poha, adding a crunchy layer to these dishes.

Available in multiple pack sizes — from small 200 g and 400 g pouches to larger 1 kg family packs — Bikaji Bhujia usually has MRPs ranging from around ₹115 for mid-size packs up to ₹330 or more for larger ones. The snack is vegetarian and typically made with traditional ingredients, giving it an authentic taste that’s loved in many Indian homes. Whether you’re enjoying it during tea time or packing it for travel snacks, Bikaji Bhujia remains a beloved choice for fans of savoury namkeen across the country.
